details.special: PSI: WT: Create Sound, Animate Shadow Powers: 6 Fire Resistance: They receive only half damage from fire based attacks. Paralyzing Bite: They can bite their opponents and secret a strong poison, a failed save vs paralysis causes the victim to be paralyzed for 1d4 days. Life Leeching: It would try to take away its victim to a Lair and start leeching 1d4 CON per day for the duration of its poison. I

system.description:
The individual tentacles of a Silt Horror, capable of independent movement and attack.
